document_title: IRD Sri Lanka Guide to Taxpayers
text: IRD Sri Lanka Guide to Taxpayers. This page is a service guide that maps taxpayer requirements to the relevant Inland Revenue Department division and the physical location to visit. The page covers guidance on taxes, registration services, clearance certificates, tax returns and paying slips, VAT refunds, stamp duty related matters, ESC direction, and construction industry guarantee fund levy related services.

document_title: IRD Sri Lanka Guide to Taxpayers
text: For guidance on all types of taxes, the relevant division is the Customer Service and Promotion Units, located on the 1st and 2nd Floors.

document_title: IRD Sri Lanka Guide to Taxpayers
subsection: TIN, VAT, SVAT, ESC, NBT, and voluntary tax files
text: Registration services listed on the Guide to Taxpayers page: Taxpayer Identification Number (TIN) is handled by the Primary Registration Unit on the 2nd Floor, and the page also links to the IRD registration page for details. Registration for VAT includes temporary registration for VAT through the Taxpayer Service Unit on the 1st Floor, South Wing; permanent registration for VAT through the VAT Registration Unit on the 2nd Floor, South Wing; and registration for SVAT through the SVAT Unit on the 2nd Floor, South Wing. Registration for Economic Service Charge is handled by the relevant unit or regional office at the relevant unit or regional office location. Registration for Nation Building Tax is handled by the relevant unit or regional office at the relevant unit or regional office location. Opening a tax file voluntarily is handled by the Information Unit or Regional Office, with the location given as 12th Floor, South Wing or the relevant office.

document_title: IRD Sri Lanka Guide to Taxpayers
subsection: Tax residence, emigration-related clearances, and VAT threshold certificate
text: Clearance certificate services listed on the Guide to Taxpayers page: Tax Residence Certificate is handled by the Secretariat on the 14th Floor. Income Tax Clearance Certificate to take or send money abroad by persons going abroad for permanent residency, where an income tax file or PAYE file is not available, is handled by the Taxpayer Service Unit on the 1st Floor, South Wing. Clearance certificates for persons paying tax under PAYE but not having a permanent file when going abroad for permanent residency are handled by the Taxpayer Service Unit at the Nawam Mawatha IRD Building. Clearance certificates for persons paying tax under PAYE and having a permanent file when going abroad for permanent residency are handled by the relevant unit or regional office at the relevant unit or regional office location. A certificate confirming that the registration limit for VAT has not been reached, when required, is handled by the VAT Registration Unit on the 2nd Floor, South Wing.

document_title: IRD Sri Lanka Guide to Taxpayers
subsection: Liquor license, EPF, ETF, and gratuity related certificates
text: Additional clearance certificate services listed on the Guide to Taxpayers page: clearance certificates for liquor licenses, where only VAT is being paid, are handled by the VAT Audit Unit on the 2nd Floor, South Wing. Clearance certificates for liquor licenses, where an income tax file is available, are handled by the relevant unit or regional office at the relevant unit or regional office location. Tax clearance certificates for EPF, ETF, and gratuity are handled by the PAYE Unit at the Nawam Mawatha IRD Building.

document_title: IRD Sri Lanka Guide to Taxpayers
subsection: Issuing returns, paying slips, and handing over VAT returns
text: Tax returns and paying slips services listed on the Guide to Taxpayers page: issuing and handing over returns of Income Tax is handled by the relevant unit or regional office at the relevant unit or regional office location. Issuing paying-in slips for Income Tax, VAT, NBT, ESC, PAYE, and Dividend or Remittance tax for TIN cases only is handled by the DPRA Unit on the 7th Floor, North Wing. Handing over returns of Value Added Tax, other than for special projects and strategic development projects, is handled by the DPRA Unit on the 7th Floor, North Wing. Handing over returns of Value Added Tax for special projects and strategic development projects is handled by the VAT Commissioner on the 2nd Floor, South Wing.

document_title: IRD Sri Lanka Guide to Taxpayers
subsection: NBT, PAYE, ESC returns and inquiries
text: Further tax returns and paying slips services: handing over returns of Nation Building Tax is handled by the relevant regional office or unit at the relevant unit or regional office location. Handing over returns of Pay As You Earn is handled by the DPRA Unit on the 7th Floor, North Wing. Handing over returns of Economic Service Charge is handled by the ESC Unit on the 7th Floor, North Wing. Inquiries about returns and paying-in slips for TIN cases only are handled by the DPRA Unit on the 7th Floor, North Wing. Inquiries about paying-in slips are handled by the Taxpayer Service Unit on the 1st Floor, South Wing.

document_title: IRD Sri Lanka Guide to Taxpayers
subsection: VAT refunds, stamp duty matters, ESC direction, and construction industry guarantee fund levy
text: Other matters listed on the Guide to Taxpayers page: VAT refunds are handled by the VAT Refund Unit on the 2nd Floor, North or South Wing. Valuation of company shares for issue and transfer of shares related to payment of stamp duty, where a TIN is available, is handled by Stamp Duty on the 11th Floor, North Wing. Stamp duty assessment for purchasing land on lease is handled by Stamp Duty on the 11th Floor, North Wing. Assessment for stamp duty on promissory notes is handled by Stamp Duty on the 11th Floor, North Wing. Direction for Economic Service Charge is handled by the ESC Unit on the 10th Floor, North Wing. All activities related to Construction Industry Guarantee Fund Levy are handled by the WHT (Interest) Unit at the Nawam Mawatha IRD Building.
